subject: Masquerain, a small insectoid Pokemon with large oval eye-spot markings on its wing-like antennae, hovering in the air
description: A small winged insect creature hovers against a bright, airy background of soft greens and whites with pink floral elements. The creature's most distinctive feature is its large, rounded antennae that bear prominent eye-spot markings — dark circular pupils set in lighter oval shapes — giving the impression of an intimidating false face. Its body is small and rounded, its wings delicate and translucent. Pink petals or flower shapes appear in the background, suggesting an outdoor garden or meadow setting.
foreground: small hovering insect creature with prominent eye-spot antennae and delicate wings
background: soft white and pale green with pink floral elements
emotion: neutral hovering poise, slight menace from the eye-spot pattern
